28.reason: [Error: This condition uses '>' instead of '>='. According to the problem, right child should be greater than or equal to the root. Since the input contains duplicate value 100, using '>' will cause the second 100 to not be inserted, resulting in the missing leaf node 100 in the output.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  这里应该使用 >= 而不是 >，因为题目要求右子节点值大于等于根节点值，当 item 等于 p->data 时，应插入到右子树
